hero.headline: Clean Energy for Every Indian Home
hero.subheadline: From residential rooftops to industrial complexes — Solarelites delivers precision-engineered solar solutions backed by government subsidies and lifetime support.

services.title: Residential Solar
services.shortDescription: Transform your home into a power plant. Cut electricity bills by up to 90% with premium rooftop solar systems.
services.description: Our residential solar solutions are designed for Indian homes of all sizes. From small apartments to large bungalows, we engineer custom solar systems that maximize energy generation and minimize your electricity bills.

services.title: Commercial Solar
services.shortDescription: Reduce operational costs and achieve sustainability targets for your business with scalable commercial solar systems.
services.description: Commercial solar installations from Solarelites help businesses across India achieve significant cost savings while meeting sustainability goals. Our systems scale from small offices to large corporate campuses.

services.title: Industrial Solar
services.shortDescription: Large-scale industrial solar parks and rooftop solutions that drive massive cost reductions and energy independence.
services.description: Industrial solar solutions from Solarelites are engineered for heavy power consumers. We design and deploy large-scale solar systems that provide predictable, low-cost energy for factories, warehouses, and industrial facilities.

process.title: Free Consultation
process.description: Our solar experts analyze your electricity bills, usage patterns, and property details to design the optimal solar system for you.

process.title: Site Inspection
process.description: A certified engineer visits your property to assess roof structure, shading analysis, electrical infrastructure, and feasibility.

process.title: Custom Design
process.description: Our engineering team creates a detailed system design, energy simulation, financial analysis, and subsidy calculation.

process.title: Subsidy & Approvals
process.description: We handle all DISCOM applications, government subsidy filings, net metering registration, and municipal permissions on your behalf.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: Our certified installation team sets up your solar system with premium components, proper wiring, and structural safety standards.

process.title: Commissioning & Support
process.description: After testing and commissioning, we set up your monitoring app and provide ongoing maintenance support for the lifetime of your system.

faqs.question: How much does a solar system cost in India?
faqs.answer: Solar system costs in India typically range from ₹45,000 to ₹75,000 per kW depending on the type of system (on-grid, off-grid, or hybrid), panel quality, and location. A typical 3 kW residential system costs ₹1.5L–₹2.25L before subsidies. After PM Surya Ghar subsidy, the net cost reduces significantly.

faqs.question: What is the PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana?
faqs.answer: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana is the Government of India's flagship solar subsidy scheme for residential consumers. It provides subsidies of ₹30,000 for 1 kW, ₹60,000 for 2 kW, and ₹78,000 for 3 kW systems. The scheme aims to provide free electricity to 1 crore households.

faqs.question: How long does solar installation take?
faqs.answer: Residential solar installations typically take 1–3 days for the physical installation. However, the complete process including consultation, design, approvals, and net metering registration takes 2–4 weeks. Commercial and industrial projects may take 4–12 weeks depending on scale.

faqs.question: What is the lifespan of a solar panel?
faqs.answer: High-quality solar panels last 25–30 years with gradual degradation of about 0.5% per year. The solar inverter typically has a lifespan of 10–15 years. Most premium panels come with a 25-year performance warranty guaranteeing at least 80% output after 25 years.

faqs.question: What happens during grid failures?
faqs.answer: On-grid solar systems automatically shut down during grid failures for safety reasons. If you need power during outages, we recommend a hybrid system with battery storage. Off-grid systems operate completely independently and provide power 24/7.

faqs.question: Do you provide maintenance services?
faqs.answer: Yes, Solarelites provides comprehensive Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC). Our maintenance includes regular panel cleaning, performance monitoring, inverter servicing, and 24/7 remote diagnostics. First-year maintenance is included free with every installation.

faqs.question: Can solar panels work during monsoon and cloudy days?
faqs.answer: Solar panels still generate electricity on cloudy days, typically at 10–25% of peak capacity. Modern high-efficiency panels are designed to perform better in diffused light conditions. Net metering allows you to export surplus summer energy and draw grid power during rainy seasons.

faqs.question: How do I apply for a government subsidy?
faqs.answer: Solarelites handles the entire subsidy application process on your behalf. We prepare all documents, submit applications to the National Portal for Rooftop Solar (https://pmsuryagarh.gov.in), coordinate with your local DISCOM, and follow up until subsidy disbursement.

pmSuryaGhar.name: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
pmSuryaGhar.description: Central government subsidy for residential rooftop solar installations.
eligibility: Must be an Indian residential consumer
Property must have an electricity connection
Must have a valid Aadhaar card
Must use an approved installer (Solarelites is empanelled)

pmKusum.name: PM-KUSUM (Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan)
pmKusum.description: Subsidy scheme for farmers to install solar pumps and small solar power plants.

subsidyRates.component: Component B (Solar pumps up to 7.5 HP)

commercialIncentives: No GST on solar panel installations
